titleStmt.title: The Ambassador in France ( Caffery ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Ambassador in France ( Caffery ) to the Secretary of State

list.label: A.
B.
list.item: I expect that Czechoslovak and Yugoslav Delegates will oppose scheme because of their opposition to paragraph 4 (c). Waley may also propose to restrict scheme to paragraph 4 (a). He insists he is under instructions from Bevin now in Moscow.Foreign Minister Ernest Bevin was in Moscow to attend the Meeting of Foreign Ministers, December 16–26, 1945; for documentation, see vol. ii, pp. 560 ff. If Waley is adamant, may I accept restriction of eligibles to class 4 (a)? Only further choice would be to drop scheme.The Department sent the following reply in telegram 5902, December 17, 7 p.m., to Paris: “Draft proposal Dec 16 approved (From Angell 157, Paris 7213). If Waley adamant exclusion 4 c, you may restrict to classes 4 a and 4 b. Restriction to class 4 c not approved.” (740.00119 EW/12–1645) [Angell.]
